person

Vivian Conley

The Cleaner leader in Warlords of New York and one of Aaron Keener's four lieutenants.

Connectionnot applicable Continuitydivision game universe Canon scopegame canon Verificationsource reviewed Reviewed2026-07-19

Cleaner regrouping

Conley's leadership marks the Cleaners' reorganization after Joe Ferro's death and ties the returning faction to Keener's Lower Manhattan network. [1]

Claim ledger

Every factual statement below must retain at least one traceable source.

  1. confirmed

    The Warlords of New York faction recap identifies Vivian Conley as the new leader under whom the Cleaners regroup and recruit. [1]

  2. confirmed

    Conley is one of Aaron Keener's four lieutenants. [1]

Sources

  1. [1] The Division 2 – State of the Game Recap: Meet the Factions of Warlords of New York — Ubisoft News (2020-02-19). Accessed 2026-07-19.
